# Test Strategy

## Automated Checks

- `npm test`: Node test runner for core/background/popup/options.
- `npm run lint`: MV3 manifest and extension file static validation.

## Coverage Targets

- Segment metadata and ordering in `tests/core.test.js`.
- Work scheduling and progress rendering in `tests/core.test.js`.
- Rule parsing and strategy merging in `tests/core.test.js`.
- Provider selection, segment translation compatibility, and cache namespace in `tests/background.test.js`.
- Existing popup/options behavior remains covered by current tests.

## Manual Smoke

- Reload unpacked extension from `extension/`.
- Open `https://www.tdwh.com/`.
- Trigger manual translate and verify top navigation, hero, Featured, Latest sidebar, placeholders, and article list receive translations.
